items.example: I'm planning to visit my family this weekend.
I'm going to try out a new pasta recipe tonight.
I've arranged to meet my brother at the station.
Hi, what are you up to this evening?
I might go out, or I might just stay home. I'll see how I feel.
What are you doing at the weekend?
I'll call you back to let you know.

items.phrase: Let me get back to you
items.example: I'm not sure yet. Let me get back to you.
